purpose: Codify travel as the spine for trade, food, horses, tavern companion recruitment, smithing, town utility, and route optimization.
coreRule: Do not select the next destination before travel is reliable and the current town has been exhausted in the ordered town utility hierarchy.

developmentOrder.rule: Travel must resume after manual intervention.
Town mechanics must run before leaving.
Market trade must run before logistics checks.
Food must be checked after the market pass and before departure.
Horses and capacity must be checked after food and before route commitment.
Tavern companion recruitment must run before smithing when useful, legal, and affordable.
Smithing should use available companion stamina before the town is considered exhausted.
Route selection should choose the next town that maximizes profit after town utility is exhausted.

downstreamUntilTravelReliable: food automation beyond the post-trade check
horse buying and pack capacity decisions beyond the post-food check
trade buying and selling loops beyond first safe market pass

knownGaps.reason: Live run reached auto-travel, encountered looters, required user movement, and did not provide a clean handoff back to automation.
Travel proof must transition into ordered town utility before selecting new travel.
partyMovedDistance == 0 alone is not enough to prove no movement occurred.
Town utility must visit the tavern and recruit useful companions before spending smithing stamina.
After town utility is exhausted, the next town should be selected by profit-maximizing route logic.

agentInstruction: Do not select the next town before the current town has completed trade sell, trade buy, food check, horse/capacity check, tavern companion recruitment, companion stamina use, and smith/refine/smelt in order.
